reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when a checked-in evidence bundle records direct or verified proof for the exact claim boundary.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the checked claim-eval-plan evidence bundle: after review, `claim plan-evals` emitted `cautilus.claim_eval_plan.v1`, included an app/prompt plan for this claim, and preserved the non-writer boundary.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep covered by a reviewed claim-plan smoke when claim eval planning or fixture-authoring guidance changes.
